user_system_path: Issue #276 COMPLETE — Command State Resolver v0 merged via PR #279 (e848d01). Between rungs: rung 9 (first non-owner validation) needs its issue created and activated before any further work.
no_routing_contract: The Agent must read ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md and the active issue before acting, and must follow the active issue exactly. The Agent may not ask Brandon to route, repeat, or arbitrate.

terminal_state_authority.merge_through_rule: Merge-through is allowed only after local proof, GitHub checks green, forbidden work touched is NO, and the PR receipt records the source-truth closeout and terminal state.

allowed_files_raw: Between rungs: only source-truth control files, docs, gates/tests/scripts, and GitHub receipts may change. No implementation surface is open until rung 9 is activated as the single active seam.
forbidden_files_raw: No implementation while between rungs. No dashboard UI, no start/try/pricing pages, no connector work, no Slack changes, no acquisition agents, no Stripe, no migrations, no #244, no #246, no reopening #259 or #276, no broad governance cleanup.
required_browser_proof: Not required. This is a between-rungs source-truth state; proof is the merged #276 closeout plus control-file parity.
acceptance_condition: Issue #276 is closed COMPLETED with a durable receipt, all three control files agree on the between-rungs state (active_issue none), and rung 9 is named as the next seam pending owner-gated issue creation.
stop_condition: Stop when the #276 closeout is merged with receipts posted. Remain stopped until the owner creates (or explicitly authorizes creating) the rung-9 issue and activates it in all three control files.
